title: Phase 0: Project Setup
description: Scaffold the project with correct directory structure, assets, and baseline files. Goal: Blank page loads with no console errors.

title: Create directory structure
description: Create: src/, src/assets/, src/assets/videos/, src/assets/bios/, src/assets/logos/, src/css/, src/js/

title: Copy video assets
description: Copy hazel.mp4, baggu.mp4, hightouch.mp4, podcast.mp4 to assets/videos/

title: Copy bio images
description: Copy hailey-choi.png, jamie-mcneill.png, ira-ko.png to assets/bios/

title: Copy TV bezel image
description: Copy tv-frame.png to assets/images/

title: Copy logo images
description: Copy pave.png, hightouch.png, hazel.png, amera.png, speakeasy.png, portable.png to assets/logos/

title: Copy main logo
description: Copy logo.webp to assets/images/

title: Verify blank page loads
description: Open index.html in browser, verify blank purple page, no console errors.

title: Verify all assets accessible
description: Check network tab: all images/videos return 200 or graceful 404 handling.

title: Create index.html boilerplate
description: HTML5 doctype, meta viewport, charset utf-8, title 'Shapeshift', link to style.css, defer main.js

title: Create style.css with reset
description: CSS reset, box-sizing border-box, html/body 100% height, overflow hidden, margin/padding 0

title: Create main.js entry point
description: ES6 module, DOMContentLoaded listener, placeholder init function

title: Create config.js with geometry constants
description: Export MASK config, HITBOX rectangles, TICKER params, PLAYLIST order. Single source of truth for all tunables.

title: Set background color #4425FC
description: Apply background: #4425FC to body. Verify rgb(68, 37, 252) in computed styles.

title: Load Ubuntu Sans Mono font
description: Google Fonts link or @font-face. Set font-family on body. Verify font loads correctly.

title: Set text color white
description: Apply color: #fff to body for default white text.

title: Disable scrollbars
description: overflow: hidden on html and body. Verify scrollWidth == clientWidth.

title: Documentation & Code Quality
description: JSDoc comments, README updates, inline documentation for complex logic. Code organization and maintainability.

title: Add JSDoc to config.js exports
description: Document all config objects with JSDoc. Types, purpose, valid value ranges.

title: Verify code formatting consistency
description: Consistent indentation, quotes, semicolons. Consider adding .editorconfig.

title: Add JSDoc to navigation functions
description: Document goToChannel, goToPrev, goToNext with params, return values, side effects.

title: Add JSDoc to state management
description: Document __PLAYER_STATE__ structure, when it updates, how to access.

title: Comment complex CSS calculations
description: Add comments explaining clip-path values, clamp calculations, z-index reasoning.

title: Create README with setup instructions
description: Document: how to run locally, how to run tests, how to deploy. Keep minimal.

title: Document test mode parameters
description: Document ?test=1, &debug=1, &marquee=run. What they do, when to use them.

title: Document config.js structure
description: Explain how to modify geometry without touching CSS. Config-driven architecture.

title: Add inline comments for tricky logic
description: Comment wraparound logic, preload strategy, focus gating. Aid future maintenance.

title: Create CHANGELOG
description: Track major changes, version history if needed. Keep lightweight.

title: Phase 3 — Channel DOM Setup
description:
Details:
- Create all 7 channels in correct order
- Initialize active channel 0 and preload policy
Reasoning:
- Navigation and playback require full channel structure

title: Define fixed playlist order in config
description:
Details:
- Use exact order specified in AGENTS.md
- Include wraparound rules
Reasoning:
- Fixed order is a hard requirement

title: Add tests for channel count/order/visibility
description:
Details:
- Assert 7 channels in fixed order
- Verify only active channel is visible
Reasoning:
- Tests lock in playlist invariants

title: Add tests for preload policy
description:
Details:
- Verify only current and next assets preload
- Ensure no global preload
Reasoning:
- Preload behavior affects performance and is required

title: Add test-mode logging hook for channel setup
description:
Details:
- Log channel initialization and asset issues when ?test=1
- Avoid logs in production mode
Reasoning:
- Scoped logging helps diagnose test failures

title: Define fixed playlist order in config
description:
Details:
- Use exact order specified in AGENTS.md
- Include wraparound rules
Reasoning:
- Fixed order is a hard requirement

title: Create channel container and render 7 channels
description:

- Render 4 video channels and 3 bio image channels

Reasoning:

title: Set channel 0 as active on load
description:
Details:
- Mark active channel and hide others
- Ensure initial video starts autoplay muted
Reasoning:

title: Hide inactive channels via CSS
description:
Details:
- Only active channel displayed
- Avoid layout shifts for hidden channels
Reasoning:
- Visibility control prevents overlapping content

title: Configure video elements with required attributes
description:
Details:
- Set muted, loop, autoplay, playsinline
- Ensure videos are inline on mobile
Reasoning:
- Video playback rules are strict requirements

title: Add bio image elements for channels 4–6
description:
Details:
- Insert bio images with proper alt text
- Ensure images scale to screen
Reasoning:
- Bio channels must render as static images

title: Add video error handling and fallback
description:
Details:
- Listen for video error events
- Log warning and show fallback state
Reasoning:
- Graceful failure is required per PLAN.md

title: Implement preload policy: current + next only
description:
Details:
- Set preload=auto for current/next
- Set preload=none or metadata for others
Reasoning:
- Preload policy is a hard requirement

title: Store channel and asset references
description:
Details:
- Keep arrays/maps of channels and videos
- Expose references for navigation and tests
Reasoning:
- Stateful navigation depends on stable references

title: Add tests for channel count/order/visibility
description:
Details:
- Assert 7 channels in fixed order
- Verify only active channel is visible
Reasoning:
- Tests lock in playlist invariants

title: Add tests for preload policy
description:
Details:
- Verify only current and next assets preload
- Ensure no global preload
Reasoning:
- Preload behavior affects performance and is required

title: Add test-mode logging hook for channel setup
description:
Details:
- Log channel initialization and asset issues when ?test=1
- Avoid logs in production mode

- Scoped logging helps diagnose test failures

title: Phase 6: Ticker Marquee
description: Implement persistent scrolling logo strip. Visible on all channels, ~24s loop, height clamped 28-56px. Small logo subset under 380px viewport.

title: Create ticker container element
description: Add div[data-ticker] inside .tv-screen. Absolute positioned at bottom of screen.

title: Set animation duration 24s
description: Animation duration ~24s for full loop. Expose via data-loop-seconds attribute.

title: Duplicate logos for seamless loop
description: Clone logo strip so animation loops seamlessly without gaps. Standard marquee technique.

title: Ensure ticker visible on all channels
description: Ticker must remain visible regardless of active channel (video or bio).

title: Verify ticker is decorative only
description: Ticker logos not wrapped in anchor tags. No click handlers. Purely decorative.

title: Verify no pause on hover
description: Ticker animation continues on hover. No :hover pause effect.

title: Test ticker at 320px viewport
description: Verify small logo set displays at 320px. Height clamped to min 28px.

title: Test ticker at 768px viewport
description: Verify full logo set displays. Height calculated correctly at this size.

title: Test ticker at 1920px viewport
description: Verify full logo set displays. Height clamped to max 56px.

title: Freeze ticker in test mode
description: In ?test=1 mode, freeze ticker at translateX=0 unless &marquee=run specified.

title: Add data-loop-seconds attribute
description: Expose loop duration for testing: data-loop-seconds='24' on ticker element.

title: Define TICKER config in config.js
description: Export TICKER: height (10%), minHeight (28px), maxHeight (56px), loopDuration (24s), bgColor (#000).

title: Calculate ticker content width
description: Calculate total width of logo strip for accurate animation distance.

title: Handle ticker resize
description: Recalculate on window resize. Update logo set if crossing 380px threshold.

title: Add ticker animation delay option
description: Config option to delay ticker start. Useful for initial load experience.

title: Style ticker with black background
description: Apply background: #000 to ticker. Verify rgb(0,0,0) in computed styles.

title: Implement ticker height clamping
description: Height = 10% of screen, clamped between 28px and 56px using clamp() or JS.

title: Create logo container for marquee
description: Add inner div to hold logo images. Will be animated for scroll effect.

title: Add full logo set images
description: Add img elements for: Pave, Hightouch, Hazel, Amera, Speakeasy, Portable. Visible >=380px.

title: Add small logo set images
description: Subset for <380px: Pave, Hightouch, Hazel, Portable. Hide Amera, Speakeasy.

title: Implement logo set switching
description: Detect viewport width, show full or small logo set. data-logo-set attribute.

title: Create CSS marquee animation
description: CSS @keyframes for infinite leftward scroll. translateX from 0 to -100% of content width.

title: Performance Optimization
description: Optimize asset loading, preload strategy, animation performance. Target 60fps on mobile devices.

title: Optimize video preload strategy
description: Only current+next video preloaded. Others have preload='none'. Monitor memory usage.

title: Add performance monitoring
description: Optional: add performance marks/measures for debugging. Remove in production.

title: Optimize font loading
description: font-display: swap for Ubuntu Sans Mono. Preload critical font weight.

title: Bundle size verification
description: Verify total JS/CSS size is minimal. No unused code. Consider inline critical CSS.

title: Lazy load bio images
description: Bio images only loaded when approaching their channel. loading='lazy' or JS lazy loading.

title: Optimize ticker animation performance
description: Use transform instead of left/margin. will-change hint. GPU acceleration.

title: Optimize CRT glitch animation
description: Use transform/opacity for glitch. Avoid layout thrashing. Short duration (180ms).

title: Minimize repaints on channel switch
description: Profile paint during navigation. Minimize DOM changes. Use visibility/opacity over display.

title: Defer non-critical JS
description: Ensure main.js is deferred. Critical rendering path unblocked.

title: Optimize image formats
description: Use WebP for logos/bios where supported. Fallback to PNG. Appropriate compression.

title: Compress video assets
description: Verify videos are appropriately compressed. Consider adaptive bitrate if needed.

title: Test performance on mobile
description: Profile on real mobile device. Target 60fps during animations. Check memory usage.

title: Phase 8: Test Mode + Playwright
description: Implement deterministic test mode (?test=1), debug overlay (?test=1&debug=1), expose window.__PLAYER_STATE__, and complete Playwright test suite.

title: Implement test mode detection
description: Check URL for ?test=1 parameter. Set global isTestMode flag. Export for module use.

title: Draw hotspot outlines in debug
description: Debug mode: show all hotspot rectangles on bio channels. Click area verification.

title: Hide debug overlay in production
description: Ensure debug overlay never visible without ?test=1&debug=1 URL parameters.

title: Initialize Playwright project
description: Create playwright.config.ts, install dependencies, set up test directory structure.

title: Create test utilities module
description: Helper functions: navigateTo, getActiveIndex, waitForCRT, checkVideoState, etc.

title: Write test: initial state index 0
description: Playwright test: on load, activeIndex===0, activeAsset==='hazel.mp4'.

title: Write test: navigation next
description: Playwright test: press ArrowRight, verify index increments correctly.

title: Write test: navigation prev
description: Playwright test: press ArrowLeft, verify index decrements correctly.

title: Write test: wraparound 0 to 6
description: Playwright test: at index 0, press prev, verify index becomes 6.

title: Write test: wraparound 6 to 0
description: Playwright test: at index 6, press next, verify index becomes 0.

title: Write test: keyboard focus gating
description: Playwright test: focus input, press arrows, verify no navigation occurs.

title: Create window.__PLAYER_STATE__ object
description: Expose state object: activeIndex, activeAsset, preloadedAssets, videoTimes. Update on changes.

title: Write test: UP hitbox click
description: Playwright test: click UP hitbox, verify prev channel activated.

title: Write test: DOWN hitbox click
description: Playwright test: click DOWN hitbox, verify next channel activated.

title: Write test: screen click no-op
description: Playwright test: click screen center (not hitbox), verify no navigation.

title: Write test: video pause on leave
description: Playwright test: play video, navigate away, verify video paused.

title: Write test: video resume on return
description: Playwright test: set currentTime, navigate away and back, verify time restored.

title: Write test: preload correctness
description: Playwright test: verify preloadedAssets always contains exactly 2 items.

title: Write test: hotspot URL validation
description: Playwright test: verify each hotspot has correct href attribute.

title: Write test: ticker logo subset
description: Playwright test: at <380px, verify small logo set. At >=380px, verify full set.

title: Write test: CRT timing
description: Playwright test: verify data-crt-active toggles true then false within 150-220ms.

title: Write test: bezel not affected by CRT
description: Playwright test: verify bezel element has no CRT-related classes or styles during glitch.

title: Freeze marquee in test mode
description: In test mode, set ticker translateX=0. No animation. Unless &marquee=run specified.

title: Create visual regression baseline
description: Capture baseline screenshots at 320px, 768px, 1920px for each channel in test mode.

title: Set up visual regression comparison
description: Configure Playwright visual comparison with appropriate threshold for minor variations.

title: Configure CI/CD for Playwright
description: GitHub Actions workflow to run Playwright tests on PR. Fail on test failures.

title: Document test mode API
description: Document ?test=1, &debug=1, &marquee=run params. Document __PLAYER_STATE__ structure.

title: Write unit test: PLAYLIST constant
description: Test PLAYLIST has exactly 7 items in correct order.

title: Write unit test: MASK config values
description: Test MASK has all required properties with valid percentages.

title: Write unit test: HITBOX config values
description: Test HITBOX_UP and HITBOX_DOWN have valid rectangle definitions.

title: Write unit test: TICKER config values
description: Test TICKER config has all required properties with valid values.

title: Write unit test: HOTSPOTS config
description: Test all 3 bio hotspot configs exist with correct URL counts.

title: Write unit test: goToChannel bounds
description: Test goToChannel rejects invalid indices (negative, >6, non-integer).

title: Make CRT deterministic in test mode
description: In test mode, CRT effect should be predictable. No random variations.

title: Write unit test: wraparound math
description: Test circular index calculation for all edge cases.

title: Write unit test: focus gating logic
description: Unit test isInputFocused helper with various element types.

title: Write unit test: video time storage
description: Test videoTimes object stores and retrieves times correctly.

title: Write unit test: preload array logic
description: Test preloadedAssets always contains current and next indices.

title: Write e2e test: full navigation cycle
description: Navigate 0→1→2→3→4→5→6→0, verify each state transition.

title: Write e2e test: rapid navigation stress
description: Rapidly navigate 50 times, verify final state correct, no errors.

title: Write e2e test: mobile viewport
description: Set viewport 375px, verify mobile layout, touch targets, link buttons.

title: Write e2e test: desktop viewport
description: Set viewport 1440px, verify desktop layout, hitbox positions.

title: Write e2e test: bio hotspot clicks
description: Navigate to each bio, click each hotspot, verify correct URL opens.

title: Write e2e test: video channel behavior
description: Navigate to video, verify plays, leave and return, verify resumes.

title: Implement debug mode detection
description: Check URL for &debug=1 parameter. Set isDebugMode flag. Only active if test mode also enabled.

title: Write e2e test: ticker visibility
description: Navigate all channels, verify ticker visible on each.

title: Write e2e test: debug overlay
description: Enable debug mode, verify all overlay elements visible.

title: Write visual test: channel 0 desktop
description: Screenshot test for hazel.mp4 channel at 1440px.

title: Write visual test: channel 0 mobile
description: Screenshot test for hazel.mp4 channel at 375px.

title: Write visual test: bio channel desktop
description: Screenshot test for ira-ko.png at 1440px.

title: Write visual test: bio channel mobile
description: Screenshot test for ira-ko.png at 375px.

title: Verify all DOM hooks present
description: Check all data-* attributes required by spec are present in DOM.

title: Verify config exports
description: Check config.js exports all required constants: MASK, HITBOX, TICKER, PLAYLIST, HOTSPOTS.

title: Write integration test: config to DOM
description: Verify config values correctly applied to DOM elements.

title: Write integration test: state sync
description: Verify __PLAYER_STATE__ always matches actual DOM state.

title: Create debug overlay container
description: Add hidden div for debug overlays. Only visible in debug mode. z-index above all content.

title: Draw screen mask outline in debug
description: Debug mode: show dotted outline of clip-path mask area. Visual verification.

title: Draw ticker bounds in debug
description: Debug mode: show outline of ticker container bounds. Height verification.

title: Draw hitbox outlines in debug
description: Debug mode: show UP and DOWN hitbox rectangles. Click area verification.

title: Phase 3: Channel DOM Setup
description: Create DOM structure for all 7 channels (4 videos + 3 bio cards). Channel 0 visible on load. Videos fail gracefully if missing.

title: Define PLAYLIST in config.js
description: Export PLAYLIST array: ['hazel.mp4', 'baggu.mp4', 'hightouch.mp4', 'podcast.mp4', 'hailey-choi.png', 'jamie-mcneill.png', 'ira-ko.png']

title: Add tvPlayer container with data attributes
description: Add div#tvPlayer with data-active-index='0' and data-active-asset='hazel.mp4'.

title: Style channel elements for full coverage
description: All channel elements: position absolute, inset 0, object-fit cover. Fill entire screen area.

title: Implement channel visibility toggling
description: Only channel matching activeIndex visible. Others display:none or visibility:hidden.

title: Set channel 0 visible on load
description: Initial state: channel 0 (hazel.mp4) visible, all others hidden. Verify DOM state on load.

title: Implement video error handling
description: Add error event listeners to videos. Log error, show fallback or gracefully hide on failure.

title: Implement image error handling
description: Add error event listeners to images. Log error, show fallback or gracefully hide on failure.

title: Add loading states for assets
description: Show loading indicator while video/image loads. Remove once canplay/load fires.

title: Test with missing video files
description: Remove video files temporarily, verify site doesn't crash, errors logged gracefully.

title: Verify only active channel displayed
description: Inspect DOM at each channel, verify exactly one channel element visible at a time.

title: Style video elements for full coverage
description: video { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } No letterboxing.

title: Create channel container structure
description: Add container for all channel elements. Only active channel visible, others hidden.

title: Style image elements for full coverage
description: img.channel { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } Fill screen.

title: Add video loop attribute
description: All video elements have loop attribute for continuous playback.

title: Add video playsinline attribute
description: All video elements have playsinline for iOS inline playback.

title: Set video muted attribute
description: All video elements have muted attribute. Required for autoplay.

title: Create video element for hazel.mp4
description: Add video element: muted, playsinline, loop, preload=none. data-channel=0, data-asset='hazel.mp4'.

title: Create video element for baggu.mp4
description: Add video element: muted, playsinline, loop, preload=none. data-channel=1, data-asset='baggu.mp4'.

title: Create video element for hightouch.mp4
description: Add video element: muted, playsinline, loop, preload=none. data-channel=2, data-asset='hightouch.mp4'.

title: Create video element for podcast.mp4
description: Add video element: muted, playsinline, loop, preload=none. data-channel=3, data-asset='podcast.mp4'.

title: Create image element for hailey-choi.png
description: Add img element for bio card. data-channel=4, data-asset='hailey-choi.png'. object-fit: cover.

title: Create image element for jamie-mcneill.png
description: Add img element for bio card. data-channel=5, data-asset='jamie-mcneill.png'. object-fit: cover.

title: Create image element for ira-ko.png
description: Add img element for bio card. data-channel=6, data-asset='ira-ko.png'. object-fit: cover.

title: Phase 4: Navigation Core
description: Implement channel switching with keyboard (Arrow keys) and bezel buttons (UP/DOWN). Includes wraparound navigation, video pause/resume, and time memory.

title: Create navigation state manager
description: Create NavManager class/module. Tracks activeIndex, handles wraparound logic (0-6 circular).

title: Apply hitbox positioning from config
description: Position hitbox buttons using config values. Use percentages for responsive sizing.

title: Prevent hitbox overlap on mobile
description: Verify UP and DOWN hitbox rectangles never intersect at any viewport size.

title: Implement video pause on channel exit
description: When leaving a video channel, call video.pause() and store currentTime.

title: Create videoTimes storage object
description: Object to store playback times: { 0: 12.5, 1: 0, ... }. Persists during session.

title: Implement video resume on channel enter
description: When entering a video channel, set currentTime from storage and call video.play().

title: Update data-active-index on navigation
description: Update #tvPlayer data-active-index attribute when channel changes.

title: Update data-active-asset on navigation
description: Update #tvPlayer data-active-asset attribute to current asset filename.

title: Implement preload strategy
description: Preload current and next asset only. Set preload='auto' on current+next, 'none' on others.

title: Expose preloadedAssets in state
description: Track which assets are preloaded in window.__PLAYER_STATE__.preloadedAssets array.

title: Test full navigation cycle
description: Navigate through all 7 channels (0→1→2→3→4→5→6→0), verify each displays correctly.

title: Implement goToChannel function
description: Function to switch to specific channel index. Updates DOM, triggers events, handles video state.

title: Test wraparound prev from 0
description: Start at channel 0, press left/up, verify shows channel 6.

title: Test wraparound next from 6
description: Start at channel 6, press right/down, verify shows channel 0.

title: Test keyboard during input focus
description: Add input to page, focus it, press arrow keys, verify navigation does NOT occur.

title: Test hitbox clicks
description: Click UP hitbox, verify prev channel. Click DOWN hitbox, verify next channel.

title: Test video time persistence
description: Play video to 5s, navigate away, return, verify resumes near 5s.

title: Verify screen click does nothing
description: Click inside TV screen (not on hitbox), verify no channel change occurs.

title: Debounce rapid navigation
description: Optional debounce to prevent accidental double-navigation. ~100ms threshold.

title: Add navigation event dispatching
description: Dispatch custom 'channelchange' event on navigation for extensibility.

title: Log navigation actions
description: Console.log channel transitions in development. Remove or disable in prod.

title: Test touch events on hitboxes
description: Verify touch/tap works on UP/DOWN hitboxes on mobile devices.

title: Implement goToPrev function
description: Navigate to previous channel. Wrap from 0 to 6. Call goToChannel with computed index.

title: Test swipe gestures (optional)
description: Optional: swipe left/right for navigation. May conflict with hotspots.

title: Optimize tap delay on mobile
description: Use touch-action: manipulation to remove 300ms tap delay.

title: Implement goToNext function
description: Navigate to next channel. Wrap from 6 to 0. Call goToChannel with computed index.

title: Add keyboard event listener
description: Listen for keydown on document. Handle ArrowLeft (prev) and ArrowRight (next).

title: Implement focus gating for keyboard
description: Check if focus is in input/textarea/select/[contenteditable]. If so, do not navigate.

title: Create UP hitbox button
description: Add button[data-hitbox='up']. Invisible, absolute positioned over UP area of bezel. Click triggers prev.

title: Create DOWN hitbox button
description: Add button[data-hitbox='down']. Invisible, absolute positioned over DOWN area of bezel. Click triggers next.

title: Define HITBOX rectangles in config.js
description: Export HITBOX_UP and HITBOX_DOWN with top, left, width, height percentages.

description: Detect offline state, log appropriately, continue with cached assets if available.
